rationale: In the citing paper, Teixeira et al. (2012) appears only once in an introductory list of prior Bayesian dynamic applications, specifically as an example in eye-tracking research. The citation is grouped with many others and is not discussed for its theory, mechanism, data, or estimation approach. The rest of the article's development of Bayesian nonparametric state-space algorithms and empirical applications does not build on this specific paper in a distinct way.
